title: dactylorhiza urvilleana
intro: Dactylorhiza urvilleana, also known as the Urvilla's marsh orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid that grows in wet meadows and marshlands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza urvilleana include the ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, although its use as a medicinal agent is not well-documented in modern scientific literature.
